creator: vedran@miletic.net
text: RxTx offers consulting around open-source scientific software, including the software that runs (or wants to run) on FreeBSD. The data, hopefully properly TOML-formatted, is as follows: [[consulting]] id = "rxtx" category = "europe" name = "RxTx" url = "https://www.rxtx.tech/" description = "RxTx offers scientific software development, maintenance, integration, and deployment services. Specific expertise is the cross-platform porting of scientific applications and libraries, including from and to FreeBSD. Contact us via our website www.rxtx.tech or by email info@rxtx.tech."
